description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: Before developing the current spell, the designated Crafter must clean up the previous spell code. Code cleanup includes the `DssSpell.sol` (spell code), `DssSpell.t.sol` (spell code tests) and `config.sol

`(deployed spell information) files. In this process of code cleanup, the Crafter must remove unused interfaces as well as spell code and test code from the last spell. If relevant, they must also clean up any dependency files from the previous spell that are not being used for the current spell.
